content.text: Small, acyclic and flexible, I know how you like your JS #IPFS buttered. You know what that memes, JS IPFS v0.35 has LEFT THE BUILDING 🚨 Read all about it 🗞 https://blog.ipfs.io/80-js-ipfs-0-35/
